card.name: Local Representative
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Advisor you control enters, you gain 1 life. Whenever players finish voting, if the choice you voted for got the most votes or tied for the most, each player draws a card. Otherwise, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Backhanded Benefactor
card.text: Gift a Treasure (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they create a Treasure token. It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Whenever an effect you control causes one or more opponents to create one or more tokens and/or draw one or more cards, you may create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Fae Instigator
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a player attacks one or more opponents and/or planeswalkers you don't control, that attacking player creates a tapped 3/1 red Faerie creature token attacking one of those players or planeswalkers.

card.name: Menagerie Keepers
card.text: Whenever one more creature tokens you control enter, if they weren't gifted, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those tokens and a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Confession Extractor
Wartime Advisor
card.text: Vigilance, haste Council's directive — {T}: Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. Activate only during combat before blockers are declared.. • Aggravate — Creatures the attacking player controls get +1/+0 and gain trample until end of turn. • Negotiate — Each player being attacked draws a card.

card.name: Zealous Fey
card.text: Menace, haste At the beginning of your second main phase, the next spell you cast this turn costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of opponents that lost life this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Accomplished Combatant
card.text: Haste This creature gets +1/+0 for each of your opponents being attacked. As long as each of your opponents is being attacked, this creature has trample.

card.name: Twinning Sprite
card.text: Flying Revolt — When this creature enters, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, return target card from your graveyard to your hand. When you return a nonland card to your hand this way, copy that card and you may cast the copy. (You still pay its costs. A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.) When this creature dies, exile it.

card.name: Hunted Fey
card.text: Lifelink When this creature leaves the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.

card.name: Inspiring Rebel
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) Vigilance When this creature enters, if it was kicked, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and other creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Rallying Pride
card.text: As long as this creature it attacking, it has first strike. Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Sprite Uplifter
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, target attacking creature without flying gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Valliant Formation
card.text: Vigilance Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Fey Altruist
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a player created a token this turn or drew a card this turn except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Contracted Recruiter
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note which draft round it is. When this creature enters, create X 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens, where X is the highest numbered draft round you noted for cards named Contracted Recruiter.

card.name: Loyal Realmkeeper
card.text: Creatures attacking your opponents and planeswalkers you don't control get +1/+0. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Hold in Custody
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. At the beginning of your second main phase, untap up to one target Advisor you control.

card.name: Martial Impetus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever enchanted creature attacks, each other creature that's attacking one of your opponents gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Charge the Line
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.) Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. If the gift was promised, untap those creatures.

card.name: Sequestered Stockpile
card.text: Contingency {1}{W} — There are four or more permanent cards in your graveyard. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{W}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Anonymous Influencer
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 1. {U}, {T}: While voting this turn, you may vote an additional time. (The votes can be for different choices or for the same choice.)

card.name: Persistent Petitioners
card.text: {1}, {T}: Target player mills a card. (They put the top card of their library into their graveyard.) Tap four untapped Advisors you control: Target player mills twelve cards. A deck can have any number of cards named Persistent Petitioners.

card.name: Fey Conjurer
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") • Tap target creature. Goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Eon Prophet
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, scry 1. Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Jesting Fey
card.text: Revolt — When this creature enters, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Flitty Infiltrator
card.text: Flying Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Courtkeeper Djinn
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature or one or more other Advisors you control enter, you may have target player draw a card. If a player draws a card this way, they discard a card.

card.name: Mothwing Matron
card.text: Flying Revolt — When this creature enters, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Domesticated Leviathan
Double Agent
card.text: Council's directive — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Loyalty — Put a defender counter on this creature. Draw a card. • Defection — Each opponent draws a card.

card.name: Expose Plans
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell or target activated or triggered ability from a conspiracy source. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Contracted Research
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note which draft round it is. Draw X cards, where X is the highest numbered draft round you noted for cards named Contracted Research.

card.name: Unrivaled Access
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) When this enchantment enters, scry 2. {U}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Draw a card.

card.name: Run Away Together
card.text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Psychic Impetus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever enchanted creature attacks, you scry 2.

card.name: Crowd Control
card.text: Council's directive — Choose target player. Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Quell — Creatures the chosen player controls get -4/-0 until end of turn. • Detain — Put a stun counter on each creature the chosen player controls. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Hidden Hand
card.text: Contingency {1}{U} — A player controls three or more creatures. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{U}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Blighttender Fae
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your end step, you gain 1 life for each opponent who lost life this turn. Then if you have two or more opponents and each of them lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Capital Banker
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a player created a token this turn or drew a card this turn except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Bleakwood Hermits
card.text: Deathtouch Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Blood Investor
card.text: When this creature enters, each player draws a card and loses 1 life.

card.name: Commoner's Cleric
card.text: Lifelink Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Clutchmother Fey
card.text: Revolt — At the beginning of your second main phase, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Marrowfield Legion
card.text: Menace This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each opponent who lost life this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Contracted Agent
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note which draft round it is. When this creature enters, up to one target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the highest numbered draft round you noted for cards named Contracted Agent.

card.name: Bleakwood Regent
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discard a card. Each opponent who can't loses 3 life. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Inside Job
card.text: Gift a tapped Soldier (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token before its other effects.) Destroy target creature or planeswalker. If the gift was promised to the controller of that permanent, draw a card.

card.name: Ruinous Bribe
card.text: Gift a Treasure (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a Treasure token before its other effects. It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If the gift was promised, that creature instead gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Deadly Precision
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {4} or sacrifice an artifact or creature. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Deathly Bargain
card.text: Target player draws two cards and loses 2 life. Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Blood for Blood
card.text: Revolt — This spell costs {2} less to cast if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn. Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Trahison des Clercs
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if targets a player that created a token or drew a card this turn. Look at target player's hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Parasitic Impetus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever enchanted creature attacks, its controller loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Fatal Fixation
card.text: Revolt — Contingency {1}{B} — A permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{B}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, destroy target creature with mana value 4 or less.

card.name: Sponsored Firebomber
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) If this creature was kicked, it enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. {T}: This creature deals damage equal to its power to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Zealous Coalition
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. Then, Soldier creatures you control gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Contracted Miscreant
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note which draft round it is. When this creature enters, target creature gets +X/+0 and gains haste until end of turn, where X is the highest numbered draft round you noted for cards named Contracted Miscreant.

card.name: Aggressive Tactician
card.text: Whenever a player attacks, that player may choose a creature that's not attacking your or a planeswalker you control. It gains menace until end of turn. (This it can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: Moonlight Legion
card.text: Haste Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Fiery Wardriver
card.text: Each other creature attacking the same player or planeswalker as this creature gets +1/+0. Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Charmed Barkripper
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you don't control can't block this turn. Goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Siege Engine
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Any player may activate this ability. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Coerced Dissent
card.text: Gift a Treasure (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a Treasure token before its other effects. It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Gain control of target creature until end of turn if its mana value is 3 or less or if the gift was promised. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Sow Unrest
card.text: Creatures target player controls get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Redevelopment Plan
card.text: You may discard a card, if you do, draw two cards. Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Rework — You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. • Finance — Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Shiny Impetus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever enchanted creature attacks, you create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Go for Broke
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.) Target creature gains double strike until end of turn. If the gift was promised, that creature also gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Show of Force
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) Destroy up to one target artifact. If this spell was kicked, creatures without flying can't block this turn.

card.name: Sudden Surge
card.text: Contingency {1}{R} — Three or more creatures are attacking. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{R}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, attacking creatures get +1/+0 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Fey Cultivator
card.text: Revolt — At the beginning of your second main phase, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Corruption Tackler
card.text: Trample During your turn, whenever one or more players create one or more tokens and/or draw one or more cards except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Splendor Bearer
card.text: Vigilance, reach When this creature enters, choose one— • Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Gaudy Showbeast
card.text: Gift a tapped Soldier (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token.) This creature gets +1/+1 as long as an opponent controls more creatures than you. This creature gets +1/+1 as long as an opponent has more cards in hand than you. This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Towering Coilbeast
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, each opponent chooses a creature they control. This creature deals damage equal to its power divided as you choose among those creatures. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Push Back
card.text: Revolt — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn. Then it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature or planeswalker an opponent controls. (Regardless of if it got the counter.)

card.name: Predatory Impetus
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3, must be blocked if able, and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Take Claim
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.) Choose one. If the gift was promised, choose one or both instead. • Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Agricultural Incentive
card.text: Council's directive — Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, and shuffle. Then, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Reap — Put that card onto the battlefield tapped. • Sow — Put that card into your hand, then draw a card.

card.name: Silent Support
card.text: Contingency {1}{G} — A player controls more permanents than you. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{G}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, scry 3, then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a creature or land card, draw a card.

card.name: Automated Infiltrator
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Feytouched Golem
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 blue Faerie creature token with flying.

card.name: Towering Peacekeeper
card.text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.) Creatures attacking you or planeswalkers you control get -1/-0.

card.name: Gilded Pinions
Evolving Wilds
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Bonder's Ornament
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {4}, {T}: Each player who controls a permanent named Bonder's Ornament draws a card.

card.name: Dilligent Bookkeeper
card.text: Whenever a player creates one or more tokens during your turn and/or draws one or more cards during your turn except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Twilight Sire
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note how many cards you've drafted this draft round, including this card. Vigilance When this creature enters, for each other creature with mana value less than or equal to the highest number you noted for cards named Twilight Sire, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you control it. Otherwise tap it.

card.name: Blessed Feyguide
card.text: Myriad, myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Then do it again. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Informed Voter
card.text: Before players begin voting, you may choose to move yourself to the end of the vote order (instead of where you would usually vote in the vote order).

card.name: Realm Guard
card.text: Flying Creatures can't attack you or planeswalkers you control unless their controller pays {1} for each of those creatures. (Creatures that enter tapped and attacking don't have to be paid for this way.)

card.name: Minister of Populations
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an Advisor card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. Whenever a creature you control attacks a player who voted for a choice you didn't vote for since your last turn, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Arresting Officer
card.text: When this creature enters, exile target creature or planeswalker. Council's directive — When this creature leaves the battlefield, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Acquit — Return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control. • Condemn — The exiled card's owner creates three 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Power Vacuum
card.text: Each player chooses any number of nontoken creatures they control with total mana value 6 or less, then sacrifices all other creatures they control.

card.name: Martial Coordination
card.text: Gift a tapped Soldier (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token.) When this enchantment enters, if the gift was promised, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Whenever a player attacks, you may tap target creature not controlled by that player.

card.name: Cut a Deal
card.text: Each opponent draws a card, then you draw a card for each opponent who drew a card this way.

card.name: Peace Dividend
card.text: Contingency {1}{W} — An opponent controls three or more tokens. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{W}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, each token that would be created under an opponent's control this turn is created under your control instead.

card.name: Mysterious Connection
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.) When this creature enters, goad target creature. If the gift was promised, that creature can't be blocked until your next turn. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Quickling
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Flying When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you return another creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Prattling Politician
card.text: Whenever this creature or another Advisor you control enters, tap target creature you don't control. Goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Stolen Secrets
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile another target nonland permanent you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. Revolt — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Disaster Response
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Quarantine — Tap each creature you don't control. Put a stun counter on each of those creatures. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) • Evacuate — Return each creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Corrupted Aristocrat
card.text: Lifelink {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you sacrificed a nontoken creature this way, this creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Minister of Punishments
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life, sacrifice a creature, or discard a card When this creature enters, return target creature or enchantment from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever players finish voting, each opponent who voted for a choice you didn't vote for this turn loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a creature or discard a card.

card.name: Ulterior Aid
card.text: Contingency {1}{B} — Your life total is less than or equal to half your starting life total. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{B}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, create a 2/2 black Faerie creature token with lifelink.

card.name: Bloodthorn Extractor
card.text: Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.) Whenever another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Thornglade Witch
card.text: Whenever an opponent loses life during your turn, if it's the first time that player has lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If it's the second time this ability has resolved this turn, you gain 2 life instead. If it's the third time, draw a card instead.

card.name: Fey Nightcaller
card.text: Revolt — When this creature enters, choose up to X, where X is the number of permanents that left the battlefield under your control this turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. • Put a flying counter on this creature. • Put a deathtouch counter on this creature. • Put a lifelink counter on this creature.

card.name: Crippling Fear
card.text: Choose a creature type. Creatures that aren't of the chosen type get -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Underhanded Initiative
card.text: Draft this card face up. As you draft a card, you may draft an additional card from that booster pack. If you do, turn this card face down, then put a card in your card pool into that booster pack. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Comeback Campaign
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.) You may cast this spell as though it had flash if the gift was promised. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Shrewd Negotiator
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens enter under a player's control, if you are that player, you gain 1 life. Otherwise, that player loses 1 life. Whenever a player draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, if you were that player, you gain 1 life. Otherwise, that player loses 1 life.

card.name: Fey of Autumn's Wrath
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, it deals that much damage to each other opponent.

card.name: Popular Militia
card.text: Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.) {1}{R}: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Minister of Reports
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. This creature can't block and can only attack players who voted for a choice you didn't vote for since your last turn.

card.name: Frontline Expert
card.text: First strike At the beginning of your end step, if this creature attacked this turn, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw a card for each opponent who lost life this turn.

card.name: Molten Exchange
card.text: Draft this card face up. Immediately after the draft, you may reveal a card in your card pool and offer it to another player. They may accept the offered card. Molten Exchange deals 3 damage to any target. If an opponent accepted an offer you made with cards named Molten Exchange, it deals 6 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets instead.

card.name: Patron of Roses
card.text: When this creature enters, goad up to one target creature. It can't block this turn. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever an attacking creature dies, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Brutal Questioning
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Endure — Brutal Questioning deals 5 damage to each opponent. • Acquiesce — Draw three cards.

card.name: Walking Wildfire
card.text: Trample Whenever one or more creatures attack an opponent or a planeswalker they control, this creature deals 2 damage to that player or planeswalker.

card.name: Explosive Justice
card.text: Gift 5 life (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they gain 5 life before its other effects.) Explosive Justice deals 2 damage to each creature and each planeswalker. If the gift was promised, it deals 3 damage to each creature and each planeswalker instead.

card.name: Radical Perspective
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, gain control of enchanted creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Enchanted creature is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Economic Injection
card.text: Contingency {1}{R} — You control six or more lands. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{R}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, exile the top three cards of your library. Until your next end step, you may play those cards.

card.name: Hardened Packmate
card.text: Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Wildwood Invoker
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, each player creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token. The tokens are goaded for the rest of the game. (They attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Minister of Resources
card.text: Council's directive — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Rations — Create a Food token. • Riches — Create a Treasure token. At the beginning of your end step, distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control, where X is the number of opponents who voted for a choice you didn't vote for this turn.

card.name: Overrun
card.text: Creatures you control get +3/+3 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Fey Duelists
card.text: Revolt — This creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn When this creature enters, you may have it fight target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Parks Project
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.) At the beginning of your end step, if a player created a token this turn or drew a card this turn except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, draw a card.

card.name: Smoke and Mirrors
card.text: Contingency {1}{G} — A creature with power 4 or greater is attacking. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{G}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, prevent all damage that would be dealt this turn by creatures your opponents control.

card.name: Foreign Aid
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — At the beginning of your upkeep, each player creates a Food token. At the beginning of your upkeep, each player may put a +1/+1 counter on a creature they control. II — At the beginning of your upkeep, each player scries 1.

card.name: Standing Military
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — All creatures have haste. Whenever a player attacks, that player creates a 1/1 white Soldier creature token that's tapped and attacking. II — Attacking creatures get +1/+0.

card.name: Bloodthirsty Blade
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and is goaded. (It attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) {1}: Attach this Equipment to target creature an opponent controls. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Supreme Authority
card.text: Contingency {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} — You have the highest life total among all players. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.) You may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs. (While this conspiracy is face up.)

card.name: Interim Representative
card.text: {2}, {T}: Choose a section of a Law on the battlefield. Starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. (Tied votes are enacted.) {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Appeals Enforcer
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, choose a section of a Law on the battlefield. If it's enacted, repeal it. It can't be enacted for as long as this creature remains on the battlefield. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Democratic Design
card.text: Trample Council's directive — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Education — Draw a card. • Treasury — Create two Treasure tokens. • Military — Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Patchwork Banner
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Lunar Arcfey
card.text: Flying Creatures attacking your opponents and planeswalkers you don't control have flying. Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Draft Legislation
card.text: Draft this card face up. As you draft a Law card, you may reveal it, note its name, then turn this card face down. Search your graveyard, hand, and/or library for an enchantment card and reveal it. If the revealed card has a name you noted for cards named Draft Legislation, put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Majority Rule
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each creature you control. Enchanted creature has myriad. (Whenever that creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of that creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Silent Majority
card.text: Contingency {1}{W} — You controlled three or more creatures that shared a creature type at the start of this turn. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{W}.) Creatures you control get +1/+1. (While this conspiracy is face up.)

card.name: Checks and Balances
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — No more than one creature can attack each combat. Each player can't cast more than one spell each turn. II — Each player can't draw more than one card each turn.

card.name: Narith, the Enchanted Voice
card.text: Flying When Narith enters, reveal the top five cards of your library. Put all Faerie cards and planeswalker cards revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Tap four untapped Faeries you control: Gain control of target creature for as long as you control this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Eager Transformationist
card.text: Creatures can't block this creature unless their controller pays {2} for each of those creatures. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw two cards, then you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, you may put a creature card with mana value less than or equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value from your hand onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put a card from your hand on top of your library.

card.name: Dutiful Stenographer
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, choose one— • Choose target instant or sorcery card in a graveyard. Its owner returns it to their hand. • Choose a face up conspiracy with contingency. Turn it face down.

card.name: Rippling Mirrorkin
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield, except it has this creature's other abilities. Revolt — At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent you controlled left the battlefield this turn, you may exile this creature then return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Records Request
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it. After you draft this card, you may add a booster pack to the draft. (Your next pick is from that booster pack. Pass it to the next player and it's drafted this draft round.) Each player may shuffle their hand and graveyard into their library. Each player who does draws seven cards. Exile Records Request.

card.name: Keeper of Proceedings
card.text: Council's directive — At the beginning of your end step, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Each opponent mills cards equal to the number of Advisors you control. • Scry X, where X is the number of Advisors you control, then draw a card.

card.name: Senator Darus Tan
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target player draws a card and loses 2 life. At the beginning of your end step, target player loses life equal to the amount of life another target player lost this turn.

card.name: Gilded Benefactor
card.text: Spells you cast have gift a Treasure. (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast that spell. If you do, before its other effects, they create a Treasure token. It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Whenever an effect you control causes one or more opponents to create one or more tokens and/or draw one or more cards, you may create a Treasure token. Whenever an opponent sacrifices a Treasure they lose 1 life.

card.name: Deathwalker Fey
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: You draw a card and you lose 1 life. If you sacrificed a nontoken creature this way, you may cast that card from your graveyard until the end of your next turn. (You still pay its costs. Timing rules still apply.)

card.name: Administrative Persecutor
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note the player who passed it to you. Flying, trample As long as a player you noted for cards named Administrative Persecutor hasn't lost the game, you can't win the game and your opponents other than players you noted for cards named Administrative Persecutor can't lose the game.

card.name: Illicit Obtainment
card.text: Contingency {1}{B} — You have no cards in hand. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{B}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Final Duties
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — Whenever a nontoken creature dies, its controller gains 2 life. Whenever a nontoken creature dies, its controller draws a card. II — Whenever a nontoken creature dies, its controller creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Fiendish Duo
card.text: First strike If a source would deal damage to an opponent, it deals double that damage to that player instead.

card.name: Goblin Anarchist
card.text: Last strike (This creature deals combat damage after creatures without last strike.) This creature gets +1/+1 for each opponent who lost life this turn.

card.name: State of Emergency
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note how many cards you've drafted this draft round, including this card. Create a number of 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens equal to the highest number you noted for cards named State of Emergency. Take an extra turn after this one. At the beginning of that turn's end step, you lose the game.

card.name: Terms of War
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — Creatures can't block creatures controlled by the player to their controller's left. Creatures can't block creatures controlled by the player to their controller's right. II — Whenever one or more creatures attack and aren't blocked, each attacking player creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Rutherford, the Presiding
card.text: Vigilance Whenever a permanent you control enters tapped, untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Rutherford and other creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: World Swallower
card.text: This creature enters with X myriad counters on it. (If a creature has multiple instances of myriad, each triggers separately.) Protection from instants and from sorceries Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Garden Mystic
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {4}{G}{G}: Target creature you control gains myriad until end of turn. (Whenever that creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of that creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Assemble the Jury
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one. Create a green and white Citizen creature token with those characteristics and put a selection counter on this enchantment. Then if this enchantment has twelve or more selection counters on it, sacrifice it. • 1/3 with reach. • 2/2 with vigilance. • 3/1 with trample.

card.name: Momentous Movement
card.text: Draft this card face up. As you draft a card, you may remove it from the draft face up. (It isn't in your card pool.) This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card you removed from the draft with cards named Momentous Movement. Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Values and Traditions
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Past — For each permanent type, return a card of that type from your graveyard to your hand. • Present — Creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control. • Future — Reveal the top six card of your library. You may put up to two creature cards with total mana value 6 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Then shuffle.

card.name: Recycling Program
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player mills three cards. I — Players may play lands from their graveyard. II — Once during each player's turn, that player may cast a nonland permanent spell from their graveyard. If a spell is cast this way, that permanent enters with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Common Defense
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. You may have your creatures block attacking creatures you don't control as though those creatures were attacking you or permanents you control. (Regardless of which permanents or players those creatures are attacking.)

card.name: Special Session
card.text: Contingency {1}{U} — Three or more spells have been cast this turn. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{U}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Scheming Symmetry
card.text: Choose two target players. Each of them searches their library for a card, then shuffles and puts that card on top.

card.name: Dubious Declaration
card.text: Contingency {1}{R} — Four or more creatures dealt combat damage to players and/or planeswalkers this turn. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{R}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, if it isn't the ending phase, untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. During that combat phase, those creatures can't attack you or planeswalkers you control.

card.name: Actions Speak Louder
card.text: Contingency {1}{G} — You control the creature with the greatest power among creatures on the battlefield. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{G}.) When this Conspiracy is turned face up, draw a card for each creature you control with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Silent Arbiter
card.text: No more than one creature can attack each combat. No more than one creature can block each combat. (If multiple players are being attacked, each may block with up to one creature.)

card.name: Singechanter
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. If this is the tenth time this ability has resolved this turn, put ten +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Mischievous Throng
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When this creature enters, create two 1/1 blue Faerie creature tokens with flying. At the beginning of your end step, exile the top card of the library of each opponent that lost life this turn. For as long as those cards remain exiled, you may play those cards. If you cast a spell this way, mana of any type can be spent to cast it.

card.name: Whelk, Brynn's Herald
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 red Lizard creature token with haste. Whenever a creature attacks or enters attacking, if it's attacking one of your opponents or a planeswalker you don't control, its controller may have it become a red Dragon with base power and toughness 4/4 and flying in addition to its other colors, types, and abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Surveillance Initiative
card.text: Adherent (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone and choose a color before drawing your opening hand. You can only cast colorless spells and spells of the chosen color.) At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Kindred Connection
card.text: Before drawing your opening hand, choose a creature type. You may spend mana as though it were any color to cast creature spells of the chosen type. Creature spells you cast that aren't of the chosen type cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Aggressive Advantage
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Lethal damage dealt to creatures you control is determined by their power rather than their toughness.

card.name: Noxious Calling
card.text: Gift a Bitterblossom (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do they create a Bitterblossom token before its other effects.) Target player loses half their life, then discards half the cards in their hand, then sacrifices half the creatures they control of their choice. Round up each time. If the gift was promised to that player, you gain life equal to the life lost this way, draw a card for each card discarded this way, and create a 1/1 blue Faerie creature token with flying for each creature sacrificed this way.

card.name: Taria, Wrath of the Fey
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Taria deals combat damage to a player, you control that player during their next combat phase. (You see all cards that player could see and make all decisions for them.)

card.name: Colossal Visitation
card.text: If one or more creature tokens would be created under your control, that many Colossal Dreadmaw tokens are created instead. (They're {4}{G}{G} 6/6 Dinosaur creatures with trample.)

card.name: The First Seat
card.text: While voting, you may vote an additional time. [+1]: Each player secretly votes for a player, then those votes are revealed. Each player with the most votes or tied for the most draws a card. [-3]: Starting with you, each player votes for a nonland permanent you don't control. Exile a permanent with the most votes or tied for most votes. [-7]: Starting with you, each player votes for time or knowledge. If time gets more votes, take an extra turn after this one. If knowledge gets more votes or the vote is tied, draw three cards.

card.name: Position of Power
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Before drawing your opening hand, you may put a creature card you drafted that isn't in your deck in the command zone. That creature card becomes your commander. (It starts with a commander tax of {0}. That card's color identity does not have to match the color identity of your starting deck. ) Your starting hand size is six.

card.name: Odar Brynn, the Instigator
card.text: Odar Brynn, the Instigator enters with your choice of an additional deathtouch counter, a lifelink counter, or shield counter on her. [+2]: You may put your choice of a deathtouch counter, lifelink counter, or shield counter on Odar Brynn. [-4]: For each opponent, Odar Brynn deals 3 damage to your choice of that player or a creature or planeswalker they control. [-10]: Create six 4/4 red Dragon creature tokens. For each kind of counter on Odar Brynn, put a counter of that kind on each of those tokens.

card.name: Canopy Treaders
card.text: Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Sprawl Levelers
card.text: Trample Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Populist Executioner
card.text: When Populist Executioner enters, each player sacrifices a creature. Each player who sacrificed a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control this way creates a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Final Verdict
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Punish — Destroy target creature or planeswalker. • Persecute — Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Invite Attractions
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Monsters — Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token. • Men — Create three 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Militant Allocator
card.text: Council's directive — When this creature enters, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Mobilize— Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens. Each opponent gains 2 life. • Resupply — Creature a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Dutiful Patrol
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent chooses an artifact or enchantment you don't control. Destroy it.

card.name: First Degree
card.text: Gift a tapped Soldier (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a tapped 1/1 white Soldier creature token before its other effects.) Destroy target creature if it's tapped or if the gift was promised.

card.name: Diplomatic Caucus
card.text: Flying Whenever players finish voting, put a +1/+1 counter on Diplomatic Caucus. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Crooked Benefactor
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. When this creature leaves the battlefield, each opponent draws a card.

card.name: Martial Enforcement
card.text: Choose one or both — • Martial Enforcement deals 3 damage to target attacking creature. • Martial Enforcement deals 3 damage to target blocking creature.

card.name: Dutiful Response
card.text: Council's directive — Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn, then, starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Protect — That creature gains indestructible until end of turn. • Serve — Untap that creature and it gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Confiscated Curiosity
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.) Enchant creature When this Aura enters, if the gift was promised, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

card.name: Bureaucrat's Bargain
card.text: Gift a Treasure (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a Treasure token before its other effects. It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If the gift was promised, counter that spell instead.

card.name: Contingent Supplies
card.text: Contingency {1}{U} — A player drew two or more cards this turn. (Start the game with this conspiracy face down in the command zone. You may turn it face up at any time while the condition is met by paying {1}{U}.) When this conspiracy is turned face up, draw a card for each opponent that has more cards in hand than you.

card.name: Fact or Fiction
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

card.name: Gemma, Radical Upstart
card.text: As long as you control eight or more Faeries, you choose how each player votes. [+1]: Create two 1/1 blue Faerie creature tokens with flying. [-6]: Starting with you, each player votes for Establish or Abolish. If Establish gets more votes, you get an emblem with "Creatures you control have indestructible." If Abolish gets more votes or the vote is tied, destroy all creatures you don't control.

card.name: Oko, Apex Anarch
card.text: [+1]: Return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. If you controlled that creature, create a 3/3 green Elk creature token. [-2]: Double target creature's power. It gains trample and "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this creature." It can't attack you or planeswalkers you control. [-7]: You get an emblem with "You have no maximum hand size" and "If a non-Oko permanent you own would leave the battlefield, you may instead return it to its owner's hand."

card.name: Crafty Ringleader
card.text: {T}: Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Outlands Troll
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you have two or more opponents and each of them lost life this turn, instead put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: Light a Fire
card.text: Light a Fire deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a creature is dealt damage this way, goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Boon-Curser Clique
card.text: Whenever you give a gift, target player loses 3 life.

card.name: Brynn's Incursion
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each opponent who lost life this turn. (Damage causes loss of life.) Brynn's Incursion deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Court Mandate
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Torture — Each opponent loses 5 life. • Persecution — All creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. • Schemes — Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle. • Chains — Choose a creature card in your graveyard. Return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Order of the Day
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Destruction — Order of the Day deals 4 damage to each creature. • Terror — Goad each creature you don't control. • Jubilation — Until your next turn, whenever a creature attacks one of your opponents, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn. • Fortune — Each may player discards their hand. If they do, they draw seven cards.

card.name: Personal Retreat
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) At the beginning of your first upkeep, you may choose a basic land card you own from outside the game and put it on top of your library.

card.name: Trade Agreement
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — Whenever a section of this Law is enacted, each player creates a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. Whenever a section of this Law is enacted, each player creates a Treasure token. II — Whenever a section of this Law is enacted, each player draws a card.

card.name: Kessel, Mercenary King
card.text: When Kessel enters, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw three cards. If a creature token would enter under your control tapped and attacking a player or planeswalker, you may instead put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking that player or planeswalker instead. If you do, sacrifice that creature at end of combat unless you pay {R} and return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Solicited Rage
card.text: Whenever a creature enters, it gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. Goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Creatures with defender can attack your opponents and planeswalkers you don't control as though they didn't have defender.

card.name: Compulsary Education
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — At the beginning of your second main phase, each player draws a card. Noncreature spells cost {1} less to cast. II — Discard a card: Draw a card. Any player may activate this ability once during their turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Fitting Punishment
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player loses 3 life. At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player discards a card. II — At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player sacrifices a permanent.

card.name: Territory Lines
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) I — Each player may play an additional land on each of their turns. Whenever a land enters, its controller may put a +1/+1 counter on a creature they control. II — All creatures have trample.

card.name: Provisions Director
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Target player creates a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. • Target player creates a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Intrepid Pathmaker
card.text: Creatures attacking your opponents have trample.

card.name: Omen of the Fey
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target creature. {2}{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Scry 2.

card.name: Strength in Numbers
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains trample and gets +X/+X, where X is the number of attacking creatures.

card.name: Contracted Supplier
card.text: Reveal this card as you draft it and note which draft round it is. When this creature enters, distribute X +1/+1 counters among any number of target creatures, where X is the highest numbered draft round you noted for cards named Contracted Supplier.

card.name: Luxury Goods
card.text: When this artifact enters, choose one— • Target player gains 3 life. • Target player draws a card. • Target player creates a tapped Treasure token. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Speaker's Podium
card.text: While voting, you may vote an additional time. {6}, {T}, Exile this artifact: End the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

card.name: Xersis, Ballot Keeper
card.text: While voting, each vote is secret. Players then reveal their secret votes to you. You may secretly change up to one vote revealed to you this way, then the votes are revealed. (You hold the votes, so you reveal those votes, including who voted for which choices.)

card.name: Judex, First Seat
card.text: You and Judex have protection from players with one or fewer cards in hand. Whenever a player attacks you or a planeswalker you control, they reveal their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. Exile that card. At the beginning of your end step, draw a card.

card.name: The Second Seat
Nature's Vengeance
card.text: Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.) Whenever a creature you control attacks a player that has drawn one or more cards or created one or more tokens this turn, double that creature's power until end of turn.

card.name: Executive Order
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Immigration — Gain control of target creature you don't control. • Economics — Choose target creature you control. Create two tokens that are each copies of it. • Procedure — Take an extra turn after this one. • Trade — Draw seven cards.

card.name: Silva, Arbiter of Compromise
card.text: Whenever an enchantment you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that enchantment is a Law, up to one target player draws a card and gains 1 life. Whenever players finish voting, each opponent who voted for a choice you didn't vote for mills two cards.

card.name: Generous Fey
card.text: Gift a card, gift a Treasure (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card. You may do the same for creating a Treasure. The gifts don't have to be promised to the same opponent.) Flying This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each gift you've promised this turn. This creature enters with a lifelink counter on it if the card was promised and a menace counter on it if the Treasure was promised.

card.name: Krisyn, Sower of Discourse
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever a creature you don't control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, tap that creature and goad it. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.) Whenever a goaded creature attacks you, put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Deception Campaign
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile another creature you control until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. Nontoken creatures you control enter as a copy of the exiled card.

card.name: Equal Rights
card.text: (As this enters, choose a section to enact. After your draw step, choose a section. Then starting with you, each player votes to enact or repeal that section. Tied votes are enacted.) Creatures have base power and toughness 3/3. I — Each player's maximum hand size is three. At the beginning of each player's end step, if they have fewer than three cards in hand, they draw cards equal to the difference. II — Each spell that would cost less than three mana to cast costs three mana to cast.

card.name: Jebodiah, Public Servant
card.text: Vigilance Creature tokens you control get +1/+1. Whenever you attack, choose a token you control. Create a token that's a copy of it. If the copy is a creature, it enters tapped and attacking.

card.name: Leyline Lender
card.text: {T}: Target opponent creatures a tapped Treasure token. When they do, add one mana of any color. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Discretionary Spending
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) {0}: Target player that hasn't been targeted by this ability creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Advantageous Proclamation
card.text: (Start the game with this conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Your minimum deck size is reduced by five.

card.name: Population Management
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Meek — Destroy all creatures with power 3 or less. • Mighty — Destroy all creatures with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Everspawn Clique
card.text: Flying Myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a tapped 1/1 blue Faerie creature token with flying.

card.name: Minister of Motions
card.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for a Law card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Whenever players finish voting, for each opponent who voted for a choice you didn't vote for, put a stun counter on up to one creature that player controls.

card.name: Veto
card.text: As you draft this card, reveal this card and another card from the same pack. Note the name of the other card. (And return it to the pack.) As long as you control an Island, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost if it targets a spell with a name you noted for cards name Veto. Counter target spell.

card.name: Puppet State
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have less cards in hand than the number of your opponents, draw cards equal to the difference. At the beginning of your first main phase, reveal your hand. Staring with the player to the left of you, each opponent may choose a nonland card revealed this way and cast it without paying its mana cost. You and permanents you control have protection from everything you own but don't control.

card.name: Rejuvenation Guarantor
card.text: Draft this card face up. As you draft a card, you may reveal it, note its name, then turn this card face down. When this creature enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand if it's a land card or a card with a name you noted for cards named Rejuvenation Guarantor.

card.name: Bleakwood Giant
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that entered the battlefield this turn. Trample

card.name: Bog Drake
card.text: Flash {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Counter target activated or triggered ability from a noncreature source. (Mana abilities can't be countered.)

card.name: Stalking Sprite
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Other Faerie creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Malicious Misinformation
card.text: Council's directive — Starting with you, each player votes for one. Choose one with the most votes or tied for the most votes. • Collude — Each opponent discards a card. • Betray — Each opponent reveals their hand. You choose two nonland cards from among them. The chosen cards owners' discard those cards.

card.name: Legislative Chamber
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {5}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Choose one. Activate only as a sorcery. • Search your library for an Aura or Law card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Destroy target enchantment.
